name: paper-excel-to-table
description: Turn paper-style form PDFs (e.g., Excel workbooks exported to PDF, or scanned layout forms) into structured CSV via an Opus 4.7 subagent. macOS only.

interface.shortDescription: Turn paper-style form PDFs into structured CSV via an Opus 4.7 subagent
interface.longDescription: Rasterizes a paper-style form PDF (e.g., an Excel workbook exported to PDF) with a Swift helper, then runs a dedicated Opus 4.7 subagent to read the pages, plan an extraction layout, write the CSV, crop low-confidence regions for re-observation, and optionally validate against a YAML schema.
defaultPrompt: Convert a paper-style form PDF into a structured CSV.
